name: Patent Monitor
description: Monitor patent filings in your technology area

agents.name: Patent Searcher
agents.purpose: Search patent databases for new filings
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search patent databases (Google Patents, USPTO) for recent filings matching the specified technology keywords. Extract titles, abstracts, filing dates, and assignees.

agents.name: Patent Analyst
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the patent filings. Identify trends, key players, and patents most relevant to the user. Highlight potential competitive threats and opportunities.

author: agentfactory
